z&ISCSIPool.initialize_connection_singlec
NotSupportedOperationr
extend
ISCSIPool.extendc
ISCSI pool for multipth might have more than one device,
        Get each device's lun info.
         Example return values:
        iSCSI:
            {
                'type': 'iscsi'
                'data': {
                    'target_iqns': ['iqn.2000-05.com.3pardata:20220002ac01e',
                                    'iqn.2000-05.com.3pardata:20220002ac01e'],
                    'target_portals': ['127.0.0.1:3260', '127.0.1.1:3260'],
                    'target_luns': [0, 0],
                    'naa': NAA,
                    'use_multipath': True,
                }
            }
        r
ip-(.*)-iscsi-(.*)-lun-(\d+)r2
lunr
